_comment: Stop-hook registration for the self-improvement loop. Merge this 'Stop' array into the 'hooks' object of your Claude Code settings.json. Back up settings.json and run `jq . settings.json` to validate after merging. Adjust the absolute path to wherever this module is deployed on disk (the snippet below assumes the EverPass tree; on the ops box it is the path to self-improve-status.sh).
